title: salvia bogotensis subsp. aratocensis
intro: Salvia bogotensis subsp. aratocensis, also known as Colombian Sage or Andean Sage, is a perennial plant native to the high-altitude regions of Colombia. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it a potential treatment for various health issues. The health benefits of Salvia bogotensis subsp. aratocensis include its ability to relieve digestive issues, reduce anxiety and stress, and act as an antiseptic. Herbal preparations of Salvia bogotensis subsp. aratocensis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, which are often consumed to harness its medicinal properties.
